routes.documentation: Retrieve all apps accessible to the authenticated user that have Mendix Cloud environments.
Creates a Free App environment for the given project.
Retrieve a specific app by AppId. Looks up the app in the 'apps' data bucket using a JSONPath filter.
Retrieve all environments for the given app.
Retrieve a specific environment (Test, Acceptance, Production, or flexible).
Start the environment. Returns a JobId to track startup progress.

Poll the status of an environment start job. Returns 'Starting' for the first 5 calls per JobId, then 'Started'. State is tracked per JobId in the 'jobCounters' data bucket — parallel calls with different JobIds are fully isolated.

responses.label: Starting (1-5 calls) then Started — per JobId

routes.documentation: Stop the running environment.
Remove all data from the environment. The environment will be stopped if it is running.
Retrieve the deployment package for a specific environment. Set url=true to include a download URL.

responses.label: OK - Package info with download URL

routes.documentation: Upload a deployment package (.mda file) via multipart/form-data. Use ?name=PackageName to set the package name.

responses.label: Payload Too Large

routes.documentation: Transport (deploy) a package to the environment.
Retrieve the current settings (constants and scheduled events) for the environment.

responses.label: OK - Environment settings from appSettings bucket

routes.documentation: Update the settings (constants and scheduled events) for the environment.
Scale the environment by adjusting the number of instances and memory per instance.
Retrieve all tags for the environment.
Create a new tag for the environment.
Delete all tags from the environment.
Download the application log for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

responses.body:
2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z INFO  - [com.mendix.core.Core] Starting application
2024-01-15T10:00:01.234Z INFO  - [com.mendix.core.Core] Application started successfully
2024-01-15T10:05:12.456Z INFO  - [MyFirstModule] Processing scheduled event: SomeScheduledEvent
2024-01-15T10:05:12.789Z INFO  - [MyFirstModule] Scheduled event completed successfully
2024-01-15T10:15:33.012Z WARN  - [com.mendix.core.Core] High memory usage detected: 85%
2024-01-15T10:20:45.678Z ERROR - [MyFirstModule] Unhandled exception in microflow: ProcessOrder
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke method on null object
	at com.mendix.MyFirstModule.processOrder(ProcessOrder.java:42)
responses.label: OK - Application logs
Not Found - No log for date

routes.documentation: Download the access (user session) log for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

responses.body:
2024-01-15T10:00:05.000Z INFO - User john.doe@example.com logged in from 192.168.1.10
2024-01-15T10:00:10.123Z INFO - User jane.doe@example.com logged in from 10.0.0.5
2024-01-15T10:30:00.456Z INFO - User john.doe@example.com logged out (session timeout)
2024-01-15T11:00:00.789Z INFO - User admin@example.com logged in from 192.168.1.1
2024-01-15T17:00:00.000Z INFO - User jane.doe@example.com logged out
responses.label: OK - Access logs
Not Found - No log for date

data.name: jobCounters
data.documentation: Tracks poll count per JobId. Keys are JobId values, values are incrementing integers. Resets to 0 on server restart.

data.name: environments
data.documentation: List of environments per AppId. Each entry has an AppId and a Modes array.

data.name: apps
data.documentation: List of apps available in the mock environment.

data.name: appSettings
data.documentation: Settings per app+environment, keyed by AppId_Mode (e.g. EnterpriseD_Production). Contains Constants (with per-env Values) and ScheduledEvents. Production key is the fallback for WarpCoreMonitor's named production environments.
